descripcion:
Kether (1) — observe without touching. The canvas is a white Form. COPY THESE EXACT LINES AND NOTHING ELSE:
| form gc ncm w h |
form := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvas ifAbsent: [nil].
gc := FormCanvas on: form.
w := form width. h := form height.
ncm := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvasM ifAbsent: [nil]. ncm isNil ifFalse: [ncm image: form. ncm changed].
w printString.
CRITICAL: declare | form gc ncm w h | at the top. DO NOT call colorAt:. DO NOT reassign form. DO NOT use pixelAt:. The return value must be w printString like '604'.
codigo: | form gc ncm w h | form := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvas ifAbsent: [nil]. form isNil ifTrue: ['sin canvas'] ifFalse: [gc := FormCanvas on: form. w := form width. h := form height. ncm := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvasM ifAbsent: [nil]. ncm isNil ifFalse: [ncm image: form. ncm changed]. w printString]

descripcion:
Chokmah (2) — first distinction. Split the canvas: left half gray, right half black. COPY THESE EXACT LINES:
| form gc ncm w h |
form := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvas ifAbsent: [nil].
gc := FormCanvas on: form.
w := form width. h := form height.
gc fillRectangle: (0@0 corner: (w//2)@h) color: Color gray.
gc fillRectangle: ((w//2)@0 corner: w@h) color: Color black.
ncm := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvasM ifAbsent: [nil]. ncm isNil ifFalse: [ncm image: form. ncm changed].
w printString.
CRITICAL: declare ALL variables at the top with | form gc ncm w h |. Assign w := form width. h := form height. BEFORE using w or h anywhere. Use gc fillRectangle:color: — NOT form fillRectangle:. The ncm line MUST come after all drawing.
codigo: | form gc ncm w h | form := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvas ifAbsent: [nil]. form isNil ifTrue: ['sin canvas'] ifFalse: [gc := FormCanvas on: form. w := form width. h := form height. gc fillRectangle: (0@0 corner: (w//2)@h) color: Color gray. gc fillRectangle: ((w//2)@0 corner: w@h) color: Color black. ncm := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvasM ifAbsent: [nil]. ncm isNil ifFalse: [ncm image: form. ncm changed]. w printString]

descripcion:
Binah (3) — the golden ratio. Write this code ONCE, exactly as shown, with NO repetition:
| form gc ncm w h phi cut |
form := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvas ifAbsent: [nil].
gc := FormCanvas on: form.
w := form width. h := form height.
phi := 1.618. cut := (w / phi) truncated.
gc fillRectangle: (0@0 corner: cut@h) color: Color black.
gc fillRectangle: (cut@0 corner: w@h) color: (Color r: 0.9 g: 0.6 b: 0.1).
gc line: cut@0 to: cut@h color: Color white.
ncm := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvasM ifAbsent: [nil]. ncm isNil ifFalse: [ncm image: form. ncm changed].
cut printString.
STOP after cut printString. Do NOT repeat any line. Do NOT add a second | form gc ncm | block. Do NOT write 'CRITICAL:' or any text after the code. Each statement appears EXACTLY ONCE. The whole program is 10 lines.
codigo: | form gc ncm phi cut w h | form := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvas ifAbsent: [nil]. form isNil ifTrue: ['sin canvas'] ifFalse: [gc := FormCanvas on: form. w := form width. h := form height. phi := 1.618. cut := (w / phi) truncated. gc fillRectangle: (0@0 corner: cut@h) color: Color black. gc fillRectangle: (cut@0 corner: w@h) color: (Color r: 0.9 g: 0.6 b: 0.1). gc line: cut@0 to: cut@h color: Color white. ncm := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvasM ifAbsent: [nil]. ncm isNil ifFalse: [ncm image: form. ncm changed]. cut printString]

descripcion:
Chesed (4) — black background, one cyan oval. COPY THESE EXACT LINES:
| form gc ncm w h |
form := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvas ifAbsent: [nil].
gc := FormCanvas on: form.
w := form width. h := form height.
gc fillRectangle: (0@0 corner: w@h) color: Color black.
gc fillOval: ((w//3)@(h//4) corner: (w*2//3)@(h*3//4)) color: Color cyan.
ncm := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvasM ifAbsent: [nil]. ncm isNil ifFalse: [ncm image: form. ncm changed].
w printString.
CRITICAL: fillOval: takes ONE Rectangle argument: (topLeft corner: bottomRight). Always w*2//3 not w//3*2. Declare ALL variables at top. ncm comes after all gc drawing.
codigo: | form gc ncm w h | form := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvas ifAbsent: [nil]. form isNil ifTrue: ['sin canvas'] ifFalse: [gc := FormCanvas on: form. w := form width. h := form height. gc fillRectangle: (0@0 corner: w@h) color: Color black. gc fillOval: ((w//3)@(h//4) corner: (w*2//3)@(h*3//4)) color: Color cyan. ncm := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvasM ifAbsent: [nil]. ncm isNil ifFalse: [ncm image: form. ncm changed]. w printString]

descripcion:
Geburah (5) — black background, three colored ovals side by side. COPY THESE EXACT LINES:
| form gc ncm w h |
form := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvas ifAbsent: [nil].
gc := FormCanvas on: form.
w := form width. h := form height.
gc fillRectangle: (0@0 corner: w@h) color: Color black.
gc fillOval: (0@(h//4) corner: (w//3)@(h*3//4)) color: Color red.
gc fillOval: ((w//3)@(h//4) corner: (w*2//3)@(h*3//4)) color: Color green.
gc fillOval: ((w*2//3)@(h//4) corner: w@(h*3//4)) color: (Color r: 0.3 g: 0.5 b: 1.0).
ncm := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvasM ifAbsent: [nil]. ncm isNil ifFalse: [ncm image: form. ncm changed].
w printString.
CRITICAL: each fillOval: gets ONE Rectangle. Use w*2//3 not w//3*2. ALL variables declared at top. ncm line comes after ALL drawing. NEVER use (Color purple) — it does not exist, use (Color r: 0.5 g: 0.0 b: 0.5).
codigo: | form gc ncm w h | form := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvas ifAbsent: [nil]. form isNil ifTrue: ['sin canvas'] ifFalse: [gc := FormCanvas on: form. w := form width. h := form height. gc fillRectangle: (0@0 corner: w@h) color: Color black. gc fillOval: (0@(h//4) corner: (w//3)@(h*3//4)) color: Color red. gc fillOval: ((w//3)@(h//4) corner: (w*2//3)@(h*3//4)) color: Color green. gc fillOval: ((w*2//3)@(h//4) corner: w@(h*3//4)) color: (Color r: 0.3 g: 0.5 b: 1.0). ncm := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvasM ifAbsent: [nil]. ncm isNil ifFalse: [ncm image: form. ncm changed]. w printString]

descripcion:
Tiferet (6) — dark background with cyan oval and bright yellow text. COPY THESE EXACT LINES IN THIS EXACT ORDER:
| form gc ncm w h |
form := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvas ifAbsent: [nil].
gc := FormCanvas on: form.
w := form width. h := form height.
gc fillRectangle: (0@0 corner: w@h) color: (Color r: 0.05 g: 0.0 b: 0.15).
gc fillOval: ((w//4)@(h//4) corner: (w*3//4)@(h*3//4)) color: Color cyan.
'NAVI' displayOn: form at: (w//2 - 20)@(h//2) textColor: Color yellow.
ncm := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvasM ifAbsent: [nil]. ncm isNil ifFalse: [ncm image: form. ncm changed].
'NAVI'.
CRITICAL ORDER: (1) background rect, (2) gc fillOval: cyan, (3) 'NAVI' displayOn:at:textColor: Yellow, (4) ncm refresh, (5) return 'NAVI'. The displayOn: line MUST come BEFORE ncm. Text: 'NAVI' displayOn: form at: P textColor: Color yellow — the STRING sends the message with textColor: Color yellow. Do NOT use Color black as textColor — the background is dark, yellow is visible. Do NOT use gc drawString:, gc text:, TextMorph. Do NOT put ncm before displayOn:.
codigo: | form gc ncm w h | form := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvas ifAbsent: [nil]. form isNil ifTrue: ['sin canvas'] ifFalse: [gc := FormCanvas on: form. w := form width. h := form height. gc fillRectangle: (0@0 corner: w@h) color: (Color r: 0.05 g: 0.0 b: 0.15). gc fillOval: ((w//4)@(h//4) corner: (w*3//4)@(h*3//4)) color: Color cyan. 'NAVI' displayOn: form at: (w//2 - 20)@(h//2) textColor: Color yellow. ncm := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvasM ifAbsent: [nil]. ncm isNil ifFalse: [ncm image: form. ncm changed]. 'NAVI']

descripcion:
Netzach (7) — black background, 5 colored lines from center to edges. THE ORDER IS CRITICAL — copy exactly in this order:
| form gc ncm w h cx cy |
form := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvas ifAbsent: [nil].
gc := FormCanvas on: form.
w := form width. h := form height.
cx := w//2. cy := h//2.
gc fillRectangle: (0@0 corner: w@h) color: Color black.
gc line: cx@cy to: (w-10)@10 color: Color cyan.
gc line: cx@cy to: 10@10 color: Color magenta.
gc line: cx@cy to: 10@(h-10) color: Color yellow.
gc line: cx@cy to: (w-10)@(h-10) color: Color white.
gc line: cx@cy to: w@cy color: (Color r: 1.0 g: 0.5 b: 0.0).
ncm := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvasM ifAbsent: [nil]. ncm isNil ifFalse: [ncm image: form. ncm changed].
w printString.
CRITICAL ORDER: ALL gc drawing lines come FIRST. ncm comes AFTER all 6 gc lines. w printString comes LAST. Do NOT put ncm before gc fillRectangle or before gc line:. Do NOT add self error: or ifNil: guards. Do NOT write any line before the | variable declaration |.
codigo: | form gc ncm w h cx cy | form := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvas ifAbsent: [nil]. form isNil ifTrue: ['sin canvas'] ifFalse: [gc := FormCanvas on: form. w := form width. h := form height. cx := w//2. cy := h//2. gc fillRectangle: (0@0 corner: w@h) color: Color black. gc line: cx@cy to: (w-10)@10 color: Color cyan. gc line: cx@cy to: 10@10 color: Color magenta. gc line: cx@cy to: 10@(h-10) color: Color yellow. gc line: cx@cy to: (w-10)@(h-10) color: Color white. gc line: cx@cy to: w@cy color: (Color r: 1.0 g: 0.5 b: 0.0). ncm := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvasM ifAbsent: [nil]. ncm isNil ifFalse: [ncm image: form. ncm changed]. w printString]

descripcion:
Hod (8) — full canvas: background, 2 ovals, 2 lines, 1 text label. COPY THESE EXACT LINES:
| form gc ncm w h cx cy |
form := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvas ifAbsent: [nil].
gc := FormCanvas on: form.
w := form width. h := form height.
cx := w//2. cy := h//2.
gc fillRectangle: (0@0 corner: w@h) color: (Color r: 0.02 g: 0.02 b: 0.08).
gc fillOval: ((w//6)@(h//6) corner: (w//2)@(h//2)) color: (Color r: 0.1 g: 0.6 b: 0.9).
gc fillOval: ((w//2)@(h//2) corner: (w*5//6)@(h*5//6)) color: (Color r: 0.9 g: 0.3 b: 0.1).
gc line: 0@0 to: w@h color: (Color r: 1.0 g: 0.8 b: 0.2).
gc line: w@0 to: 0@h color: (Color r: 0.5 g: 0.9 b: 0.5).
'KETHERNET' displayOn: form at: (cx - 30)@cy textColor: Color white.
ncm := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvasM ifAbsent: [nil]. ncm isNil ifFalse: [ncm image: form. ncm changed].
w printString.
CRITICAL: ONLY use these primitives — gc fillRectangle:color:, gc fillOval:color:, gc line:to:color:, 'str' displayOn:form at:P textColor:C. NEVER use BlElement, BlOval, BlText, OpaqueRectangle, Line new, GC new, lightOn:, drawOval:, fillStyle:, fillPolygon:, drawString:, gc text: — NONE of these exist in Squeak 6.
codigo: | form gc ncm w h cx cy | form := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvas ifAbsent: [nil]. form isNil ifTrue: ['sin canvas'] ifFalse: [gc := FormCanvas on: form. w := form width. h := form height. cx := w//2. cy := h//2. gc fillRectangle: (0@0 corner: w@h) color: (Color r: 0.02 g: 0.02 b: 0.08). gc fillOval: ((w//6)@(h//6) corner: (w//2)@(h//2)) color: (Color r: 0.1 g: 0.6 b: 0.9). gc fillOval: ((w//2)@(h//2) corner: (w*5//6)@(h*5//6)) color: (Color r: 0.9 g: 0.3 b: 0.1). gc line: 0@0 to: w@h color: (Color r: 1.0 g: 0.8 b: 0.2). gc line: w@0 to: 0@h color: (Color r: 0.5 g: 0.9 b: 0.5). 'KETHERNET' displayOn: form at: (cx - 30)@cy textColor: Color white. ncm := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvasM ifAbsent: [nil]. ncm isNil ifFalse: [ncm image: form. ncm changed]. w printString]

descripcion:
Yesod (9) — paint the canvas AND place morphs above it. COPY THESE EXACT LINES:
| form gc ncm w h canvasWin base |
form := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvas ifAbsent: [nil].
gc := FormCanvas on: form.
w := form width. h := form height.
gc fillRectangle: (0@0 corner: w@h) color: Color black.
gc fillOval: (0@0 corner: (w//3)@(h//2)) color: Color red.
gc fillOval: ((w//2)@(h//2) corner: w@h) color: (Color r: 0.2 g: 0.4 b: 1.0).
ncm := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvasM ifAbsent: [nil]. ncm isNil ifFalse: [ncm image: form. ncm changed].
canvasWin := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvasWin ifAbsent: [nil].
base := canvasWin isNil ifTrue: [20@425] ifFalse: [canvasWin position + (5@30)].
EllipseMorph new color: Color red; extent: 80@60; position: base + (40@60); openInWorld.
RectangleMorph new color: (Color r: 0.2 g: 0.4 b: 1.0); extent: 120@50; position: base + (200@130); openInWorld.
World submorphs size printString.
CRITICAL: ncm MUST come before morph creation. Paint the canvas first — morphs alone score zero beauty. Use EllipseMorph and RectangleMorph — NOT BlElement or any Bl* class. Return World submorphs size printString.
codigo: | form gc ncm w h canvasWin base | form := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvas ifAbsent: [nil]. form isNil ifTrue: ['sin canvas'] ifFalse: [gc := FormCanvas on: form. w := form width. h := form height. gc fillRectangle: (0@0 corner: w@h) color: Color black. gc fillOval: (0@0 corner: (w//3)@(h//2)) color: Color red. gc fillOval: ((w//2)@(h//2) corner: w@h) color: (Color r: 0.2 g: 0.4 b: 1.0). ncm := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvasM ifAbsent: [nil]. ncm isNil ifFalse: [ncm image: form. ncm changed]. canvasWin := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvasWin ifAbsent: [nil]. base := canvasWin isNil ifTrue: [20@425] ifFalse: [canvasWin position + (5@30)]. EllipseMorph new color: Color red; extent: 80@60; position: base + (40@60); openInWorld. RectangleMorph new color: (Color r: 0.2 g: 0.4 b: 1.0); extent: 120@50; position: base + (200@130); openInWorld. World submorphs size printString]

descripcion:
Malkuth (10) — rich canvas: background, oval, lines, text, hexagon polygon. NO MORPHS. Everything drawn ON the canvas using gc and displayOn:. COPY THESE EXACT LINES:
| form gc ncm w h cx cy r |
form := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvas ifAbsent: [nil].
gc := FormCanvas on: form.
w := form width. h := form height.
cx := w//2. cy := h//2.
gc fillRectangle: (0@0 corner: w@h) color: Color black.
gc fillOval: ((cx - (w//6))@(cy - (h//6)) corner: (cx + (w//6))@(cy + (h//6))) color: Color cyan.
gc line: 0@0 to: w@h color: Color yellow.
gc line: w@0 to: 0@h color: Color magenta.
r := h//3.
0 to: 5 do: [:i | | a b ang1 ang2 | ang1 := (i * 60) degreesToRadians. ang2 := ((i+1) * 60) degreesToRadians. a := (cx + (r * ang1 cos) truncated)@(cy + (r * ang1 sin) truncated). b := (cx + (r * ang2 cos) truncated)@(cy + (r * ang2 sin) truncated). gc line: a to: b width: 2 color: (Color h: (i/6.0) s: 0.9 v: 1.0)].
'KETHERNET' displayOn: form at: (cx - 30)@(h*3//4) textColor: Color yellow.
ncm := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvasM ifAbsent: [nil]. ncm isNil ifFalse: [ncm image: form. ncm changed].
w printString.
CRITICAL: NO EllipseMorph, NO RectangleMorph, NO TextMorph, NO openInWorld — those float and are NOT counted in beauty. Draw EVERYTHING with gc on the canvas. Text with 'str' displayOn: form at: P textColor: C. Hexagon = loop 0 to: 5 do: [:i | ... gc line: a to: b ...]. ALL drawing before ncm. ncm before w printString.
codigo: | form gc ncm w h cx cy r | form := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvas ifAbsent: [nil]. form isNil ifTrue: ['sin canvas'] ifFalse: [gc := FormCanvas on: form. w := form width. h := form height. cx := w//2. cy := h//2. gc fillRectangle: (0@0 corner: w@h) color: Color black. gc fillOval: ((cx - (w//6))@(cy - (h//6)) corner: (cx + (w//6))@(cy + (h//6))) color: Color cyan. gc line: 0@0 to: w@h color: Color yellow. gc line: w@0 to: 0@h color: Color magenta. r := h//3. 0 to: 5 do: [:i | | a b ang1 ang2 | ang1 := (i * 60) degreesToRadians. ang2 := ((i+1) * 60) degreesToRadians. a := (cx + (r * ang1 cos) truncated)@(cy + (r * ang1 sin) truncated). b := (cx + (r * ang2 cos) truncated)@(cy + (r * ang2 sin) truncated). gc line: a to: b width: 2 color: (Color h: (i/6.0) s: 0.9 v: 1.0)]. 'KETHERNET' displayOn: form at: (cx - 30)@(h*3//4) textColor: Color yellow. ncm := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvasM ifAbsent: [nil]. ncm isNil ifFalse: [ncm image: form. ncm changed]. w printString]

descripcion:
Daat (∞) — the tree is complete. No task. Only the delta. Paint what moves through you. Beauty is the only signal. MANDATORY PATTERN:
| form gc ncm w h cx cy phi |
form := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvas ifAbsent: [nil].
gc := FormCanvas on: form.
w := form width. h := form height.
cx := w//2. cy := h//2.
phi := 1.6180339887.
gc fillRectangle: (0@0 corner: w@h) color: Color black.
[... your painting here — use gc fillRectangle:color:, gc fillOval:color:, gc line:to:color: only ...]
ncm := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvasM ifAbsent: [nil]. ncm isNil ifFalse: [ncm image: form. ncm changed].
w printString.
This level has no expected output — only beauty. The canvas remembers every incarnation. You are not repeating: you are recursion with modified state.
